scripts.build:inference-test: tsc --strict --target es2020 --module commonjs --lib es2020 --outDir packages/inference/test/.build packages/inference/src/outputSchema.ts packages/inference/src/types.ts packages/inference/src/policyReference.ts packages/inference/src/prescribe.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/cosine.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/codebase.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/triage.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/wordpiece.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/onnxEmbedder.ts packages/inference/src/semantic/embedder.ts
